annotations.description: Recorded per-gateway cellular uplink signal metrics (RSRP / RSRQ / SINR) from /organizations/{orgId}/cellularGateway/uplink/statuses — series labelled by serial + uplink. Essential for MG deployments where cellular link-quality degradation over the last hour is otherwise invisible (the Meraki endpoint returns only 'now').
annotations.summary: Cellular gateway uplink signal recorded for Meraki org 987654
